key: Hi! Is this your first time at the Restructuring Summit?
text: Hi! Is this your first time at the Restructuring Summit?

key: Hi! Yes, it is. I am Eduarda, from Houlihan Lokey in São Paulo.
text: Hi! Yes, it is. I am Eduarda, from Houlihan Lokey in São Paulo.

key: Nice to meet you! I am Sofia, from a firm in Milan. What brings you here?
text: Nice to meet you! I am Sofia, from a firm in Milan. What brings you here?

key: I want to learn about cross-border deals. Do you come to this event every year?
text: I want to learn about cross-border deals. Do you come to this event every year?

key: Yes, I do. It is a great place to mingle and meet new people. Have you been to Milan?
text: Yes, I do. It is a great place to mingle and meet new people. Have you been to Milan?

key: Not yet, but I would love to. How do you know the organizers?
text: Not yet, but I would love to. How do you know the organizers?

key: I worked with them on a deal last year. We have a lot in common.
text: I worked with them on a deal last year. We have a lot in common.

key: We definitely found some common ground. Let's stay in touch.
text: We definitely found some common ground. Let's stay in touch.

text: Hi, I do not think we have met. I am Eduarda. What brings you to the conference? Oh, restructuring is my field too. Have you been to São Paulo before? We have a lot in common. Here is my card. It was great talking to you. Let's stay in touch.

key: Hi, is this seat taken? I am Eduarda, from São Paulo. This is my first time at this summit. What brings you here? I always like to break the ice with a simple question.
text: Hi, is this seat taken? I am Eduarda, from São Paulo. This is my first time at this summit. What brings you here? I always like to break the ice with a simple question.

key: Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the networking reception. Please mingle, make small talk, and find some common ground. Do not be shy. The best deals often start with a simple conversation.
text: Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the networking reception. Please mingle, make small talk, and find some common ground. Do not be shy. The best deals often start with a simple conversation.
